feature_name: "between"(arg_1 any, arg_2 any, arg_3 any, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_btw (id INT, value VARCHAR(10));
SELECT * FROM test_btw WHERE between(value, 'aa', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false);
UPDATE test_btw SET value = 'ad' WHERE between(value, 'aa', 'ac', false, false, false, false, false);
